SESSION.NAME: defaultSession
SESSION.DESCRIPTION: This diagnostic session enables the default diagnostic session in the server(s) and does not support any diagnostic application timeout handling provisions (e.g., TesterPresent service is not necessary to keep the session active). A server shall always start the default diagnostic session when powered up. If no other diagnostic session is started, then the default diagnostic session shall be running as long as the server is powered.

SESSION.NAME: programmingSession
SESSION.DESCRIPTION: This diagnosticSession enables all diagnostic services required to support the memory programming of a server. Regardless of whether the programmingSession runs in boot software or not, the ECU shall automatically suspend logging of DTCs and suspend transmission of non-diagnostic frames when entering the programmingSession.

SESSION.NAME: extendedDiagnosticSession
SESSION.DESCRIPTION: This diagnosticSession is used to enable timed diagnostic service functionality (e.g., I/O control). The diagnostic functionality in this session shall also include all supported diagnostic functionality supported in the defaultSession.

SESSION.NAME: NVMSecureProgSession
SESSION.DESCRIPTION: This NVMSecureProgSession is a secure session used to enable NVM programming diagnostic routines. This is done so a casual user is not able to reprogram the contents of the NVM. This session supports the following diagnostic routines: $FE22 Program NVM from ROM And more...

DATA_FORMAT_IDENTIFIER.NAME: No Compression Method and No Encryption Method

DID.NAME: Number of Trouble Codes Set due to Diagnostic Test

SUB_FIELD.NAME: Number of Trouble Codes Set due to Diagnostic Test

ENUM_MEMBER.DESCRIPTION: Volume Limitation is On with Vehicle Speed of 30 km/h

enabled (Exhaust mode selection in the cluster)

SUB_FIELD.NAME: SUPPLIER USE Filter Bypass Mode DID

DTC_FAILURE_TYPE.DESCRIPTION: Alive / Sequence Counter Incorrect / Not Updated

DTC_EXTENDED_DATA_RECORD.NAME: Operation cycle counter #2
DTC_EXTENDED_DATA_RECORD.DESCRIPTION: Number of operation cycles since the DTC fault detection counter last reached its maximum value of +127 (since DTC information was last cleared). The operation cycles during which the test was not completed shall be excluded

DTC_EXTENDED_DATA_RECORD.NAME: DTC Fault Detection Counter
DTC_EXTENDED_DATA_RECORD.DESCRIPTION: The purpose of this counter is to provide a mechanism for filtering the results of a low-level fault detection process so that test results (pass and fail) can be qualified before setting any DTC status bits.

DTC_OPERATION_CYCLES_SUPPORTED.DTC_OPERATION_CYCLE: Key in Run, ACC, or Delayed Acc. Voltage is between 10 and 16 volts.Key in Run, ACC, or Delayed Acc. Voltage is between 10 and 16 volts.

DTC.DESCRIPTION: Fuel Level Sensor "A" Circuit

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Fail: Fuel Sender circuit is Short-to-Ground for 33 seconds or more
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: Fuel Gauge pointer drops/stays below the empty chaplet
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Fuel Gauge pointer drops/stays below the empty chaplet even though more fuel may be in the tank than indicated

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Fail: Fuel Sender circuit is Open or Short-to-Battery for 33 seconds or more
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: Fuel Gauge pointer drops/stays below the empty chaplet
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Fuel Gauge pointer drops/stays below the empty chaplet even though more fuel may be in the tank than indicated

DTC.DESCRIPTION: Fuel Level Sensor "B" Circuit

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Fail: Fuel Sender circuit is Short-to-Ground for 33 seconds or more
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: Fuel Gauge pointer drops/stays below the empty chaplet
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Fuel Gauge pointer drops/stays below the empty chaplet even though more fuel may be in the tank than indicated

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Fail: Fuel Sender circuit is Open or Short-to-Battery for 33 seconds or more
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: Fuel Gauge pointer drops/stays below the empty chaplet
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Fuel Gauge pointer drops/stays below the empty chaplet even though more fuel may be in the tank than indicated

DTC.DESCRIPTION: Generator Mismatch with Vehicle Configuration

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Fail: Set if Available graphics do not match seat configuration. Pass: Available graphics match configuration.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Warnings, display elements, and IoD associated for Warning-Belt Monitor will be disabled when DTC 160B is set.

DTC.DESCRIPTION: High Vehicle Speed Observed in Park

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Fail: Transmission_Type_Cfg is equal to Automatic (0x0) and Gear Switch is on P position AND Veh_V_ActlEng greater than 15km/h AND VehVActlEng_D_Qf is equal to OK (0x3) or Not_Within_Specifications (0x2). Pass: If fail criteria is not met.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: The vehicle speed is bigger than 15km/ during Park Position.

DTC.DESCRIPTION: Display

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Fail: Set if an Internal cluser HW failure condition is present related the external Display. This is primarily serializer faults. Pass: If fail criteria is not met.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Error on Display

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Fail: Set if an External cluser HW fail condition is present related the external Display. This includes remote display behavior issues, remote display fault indicators/requests, etc. Pass: If fail criteria is not met.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Error on Display

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Fail: If set I2C_Unsuppted_Display_DTC_Flag = 1 Pass: If fail criteria is not met.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Error on Display

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Fail: If set I2C_Display_Thermal_Err_DTC_Flag = 1 Pass: If fail criteria is not met.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Error on Display

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Fail: Set if LVDS Source Module detects a condition where the LVDS link is operational but the display microcontroller has a persistent NAK response (> 500ms) according to IFS-MMI2C-SR-REQ-199353/A-Loss of Communication with Display Microcontroller Pass: If fail criteria is not met.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Error on Display

DTC.DESCRIPTION: Steering Wheel Right Switch Pack

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Fail: DTC set if Signal SteWhlSwtchOk_B_Stat = 0x1 (Button_Pressed) (Message 0x81) for 90 seconds continuously. Pass: If fail condition is not met

DTC.DESCRIPTION: Fuel Type Mismatch

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Fail:If there's a mismatch between the DExx configurations and the ECVC information (for Fuel Type), then log the DTC Pass: No mismatch present

DTC.DESCRIPTION: Transmission Type Mismatch

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Faill:If there's a mismatch between the DExx configurations and the ECVC information (for Transmission Type), then log the DTC Pass: No mismatch present

DTC.DESCRIPTION: Speaker #1

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: PASS: Speaker NOT shorted to Ground. FAIL: Speaker shorted to Ground. In startup diagnostics: For fail state, this DTC will be set only after 3 retries.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Loss of speaker.

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: PASS: Speaker NOT shorted to Battery. FAIL: Speaker shorted to Battery. In startup diagnostics: For fail state, this DTC will be set only after 3 retries.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Loss of speaker

DTC.DESCRIPTION: Lost Communication With ECM/PCM "A"

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Fail: DTC set if Message 0x23 | 0x165 | 0x166 | 0x178| 0x179 | 0x17D | 0x202 | 0x204 | 0x20B | 0x263 | 0x311 | 0x380 | 0x381 | 0x382 | 0x3B2 | 0x412 | 0x421 | 0x424 | 0x42D | 0x42F | 0x171 | 0x185 | 0x156 | 0x480 is missing for 5 seconds Pass: Received data for all listed messages.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Features inoperable: XXXXXXX

DTC.DESCRIPTION: Lost Communication with Transfer Case Control Module

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Fail: DTC set if Message 0x4a2 is missing for 5 seconds Pass: Received data for all listed messages.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Features inoperable: XXXXXXX

DTC.DESCRIPTION: Lost Communication With Gear Shift Control Module A

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Fail: If set, will be missing signals in msg 0x168 (Missing data for 5 sec or more). Pass: Received data

DTC.DESCRIPTION: Lost Communication With Battery Energy Control Module "A"

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Fail: If set, will be missing msg 0x252 (Missing data for 5 sec or more) Pass: Received data

DTC.DESCRIPTION: Lost Communication With All Wheel Drive Control Module

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Fail: DTC set if Message 0x___ | 0x___ is missing for _ seconds Pass: Received data for all listed messages.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Features inoperable: XXXXXXX

DTC.DESCRIPTION: Lost Communication With Anti-Lock Brake System (ABS) Control Module "A"

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Fail: DTC set if Message 0x7C | 0x416 | 0x420 | 0x41E | 0xC121 is missing for 5 seconds Pass: Received data for all listed messages.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Features inoperable: Brake Warnings and Telltales

DTC.DESCRIPTION: Lost Communication With Steering Angle Sensor Module

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Fail: DTC set if Message 0x81 is missing for 5 seconds Pass: Received data for all listed messages.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Features inoperable: S Family Message Center

DTC.DESCRIPTION: Lost Communication With Power Steering Control Module "A"

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Fail: DTC set if Message 0x82 is missing for 5 seconds Pass: Received data for all listed messages.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Features inoperable: XXXXXXX

DTC.DESCRIPTION: Lost Communication With Trailer Brake Control Module

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Fail: DTC set if Message 0x443 | 0x445 | 0x4DE is missing for 5 seconds Pass: Received data for all listed messages.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Features inoperable: Trailer Brake Warnings,Telltales and Setup

DTC.DESCRIPTION: Lost Communication With Pedestrian Alert Control Module

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Fail: DTC set if message 0x40C is missing for 5 seconds or more Pass: Received data
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Features Inoperable:

DTC.DESCRIPTION: Lost Communication With Body Control Module

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Fail: DTC set if Message 0x167 | 0x202 | 0x3B2 | 0x3BA | 0x3C3 | 0x3C6 | 0x38D | 0x41A | 0x423 is missing for 5 seconds. Pass: Received data for all listed messages.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Features inoperable: Door Ajar Warning, Passive Entry Passive Start Immobilizer Warning, Warning Dimming Scroll Bar, Outside Air Temperature, Head Lamps On Reminder Chime, Warning Brake System,

DTC.DESCRIPTION: Lost Communication With Restraints Control Module

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Fail: DTC set if Message 0x4C is missing for 5 seconds Pass: Received data for all listed messages.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Seatbelt telltale, Seatbelt chime status and seatbelt minder chimes default to OFF

DTC.DESCRIPTION: Lost Communication With Parking Assist Control Module "A"

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Fail: DTC set if Message 0x3A8 | 0x3AA | 0x3AB | 0x3AE | is missing for 5 seconds Pass: Received data for all listed messages.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Features inoperable: Front Park Aid and Rear Park Aid Warning and Chime

DTC.DESCRIPTION: Lost Communication With Navigation Display Module

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Fail: LVDS Source Module detects an LVDS serial link fault (I2C_LVDS_Link_Err_DTC_Flag = 1) Pass: If fail criteria is not met.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Error on Display

DTC.DESCRIPTION: Lost Communication With "Digital Audio Control Module A"

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Fail: DTC set if Message 0x223 is missing for 5 seconds Pass: Received data for all listed messages.

DTC.DESCRIPTION: Lost Communication With Telematic Control Module "A"

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Fail: If set, will be missing signals in msg 0x27E (Missing data for 5 sec or more). Pass: Received data

DTC.DESCRIPTION: Lost Communication With Door Control Module "G"

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Fail: DTC set if message 0x4C0 is missing for 5 sec or more. Pass: Messages from DCMG received
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Features Inoperable:

DTC.DESCRIPTION: Lost Communication With Door Control Module "H"

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Fail: DTC set if message 0x4C1 is missing for 5 sec or more. Pass: Messages from DCMH received
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Features inoperable: Power Liftgate/Decklid/Sliding Door Warning and Chime

DTC.DESCRIPTION: Lost Communication With Steering Column Control Module

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Fail: DTC set if Message 0x81 | 0x83 is missing for 5 seconds Pass: Received data for all listed messages.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Features inoperable: Pro Power Warning and S Family Message Center navigation

DTC.DESCRIPTION: Lost Communication With Rear Gate Module

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Fail: DTC set if Message 0x313 is missing for 5 seconds
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Features inoperable: Power Liftgate/Decklid/Sliding Door Warning and Chime

DTC.DESCRIPTION: Lost Communication With Side Obstacle Detection Control Module "A"

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Fail: DTC set if Message 0x3A6 | 0x4CD is missing for 1.6 seconds Pass: Received data for all listed messages.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Features inoperable: Blind Spot Monitor and BTT with Cross Traffic Alerts

DTC.DESCRIPTION: Lost Communication With Side Obstacle Detection Control Module "B"

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Fail: DTC set if Message 0x3A7 | 0x4CD is missing for 1.6 seconds Pass: Received data for all listed messages.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Features inoperable: Blind Spot Monitor and BTT with Cross Traffic Alerts

DTC.DESCRIPTION: Lost Communication With Image Processing Module A

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Fail: DTC set if Message 0x18A | 0x3B2 | 0x3D8 | 0x3D9 | 0x3CD | 0x451 | 0x4D5 | 0x4D6 is missing for 5 seconds Pass: Received data for all listed messages.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Features inoperable: Adaptive Cruise Control, Traffic Sign Recognition, Lane Assist System, Driver Alert System, Highway Assist with Lane Centering, Exit Warning

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Fail: DTC set if Message 0x___ | 0x___ is missing for _ seconds Pass: Received data for all listed messages.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Features inoperable: XXXXXXX

DTC.DESCRIPTION: Lost Communication With Image Processing Module B

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Fail: DTC set if Message 0x451 is missing for 5 seconds Pass: Received data for all listed messages.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Features inoperable: Warning Reverse Brake Assist

DTC.DESCRIPTION: Lost Communication With Headlamp Control Module "A"

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Fail: DTC set if Message 0x334 is missing for 5 seconds Pass: Received data for all listed messages.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Features inoperable: Warning Adaptive Headlamps

DTC.DESCRIPTION: Lost Communication With Running Board Control Module A

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Fail: DTC set if Message 0x4A5 is missing for 5 seconds Pass: Received data for all listed messages.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Features inoperable: XXXXXXX

DTC.DESCRIPTION: Lost Communication with "Seat Control Module J"

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Fail: If set, will be missing message 0x487 for 5 sec or more Pass: Received data
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Features inoperable: Belt Monitor

DTC.DESCRIPTION: Lost Communication With Accessory Protocol Interface Module

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Fail: DTC set if Message 0x___ | 0x___ is missing for _ seconds Pass: Received data for all listed messages.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Features inoperable: XXXXXXX

DTC.DESCRIPTION: Lost Communication With Hybrid/EV Powertrain Control Module "A"

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Fail: If set, will be missing msg 0x25A | 0x311 | 0x312 | 0x32B | 0x365 | 0x366 | 0x367 | 0x368 | 0x369 | 0x442 | 0x471 | 0x474 (Missing data for 5 sec or more) Pass: Received data
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Features inoperable: Power Gauge, High Voltage Battery Gauge, Charge Cord Connect RTT, New Joy of Driving Animation Display,

DTC.DESCRIPTION: Invalid Data Received from ECM/PCM A

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Invalid data in Signal EngClnt_Te_Actl - EngClnt_Te_Actl - EngTemp In and EngClnt_Te_D_Qf - EngTempQF In (0x156) | OdoCount (0x179) | Veh_V_ActlEng (0x202)) | EngOil_Te_Actl (0x156) | VehVActlBrk_No_Corr (0x420) | CruiseCtrlSetSpd In (0x165) for 5 sec or more. Pass: Received Valid Data for all listed messages.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Features inoperable: Odometer, Speedometer, Engine Temperature Gauge, Engine Oil Temperature Gauge

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Invalid data in Signal EngClnt_Te_Actl - EngClnt_Te_Actl - EngTemp In and EngClnt_Te_D_Qf - EngTempQF In (0x156) | OdoCount (0x179) | Veh_V_ActlEng (0x202)) | EngOil_Te_Actl (0x156) | VehVActlBrk_No_Corr (0x420) for 5 sec or more. Pass: Received Valid Data for all listed messages.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Features inoperable: Odometer, Temerature Gauges

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Fail: signal ePRNDL E2E Invalid (No Update for 600 ms or more) Pass: If all the fail criteria is not met.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: ePRNDL indication missing

DTC.DESCRIPTION: Invalid Data Received From Cruise Control Module

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: AccMemEnbl_B_RqDrv = Yes & Adaptive Cruise Cfg = Disabled for 5 seconds or more
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Features inoperable: Adaptive Cruise Control Interface

DTC.DESCRIPTION: Invalid Data Received From Battery Energy Control Module "A"

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Fail: If set, will be missing msg 0x252 (Missing data for 5 sec or more) Pass: Received data

DTC.DESCRIPTION: Invalid Data Received from Anti-Lock Brake System (ABS) Control Module "A"

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Invalid data in Signal SelDrvMde_D2_Rq (0x420) | SelDrvMdeMsgTxt_D_Rq (0x420) | SelDrvMde_D_Stat (0x420) | VehLongComp_A_Actl (0x7C) | VehLongAccel In (0x7C) for 5 sec or more. Pass: Received Valid Data for all listed messages.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: SDM Inoperable

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Invalid data in Signal SelDrvMde_D2_Rq (0x420) | SelDrvMdeMsgTxt_D_Rq (0x420) | SelDrvMde_D_Stat (0x420) | VehLongComp_A_Actl (0x7C) | VehLatAccel In (0x7C) for 5 sec or more. Pass: Received Valid Data for all listed messages.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: SDM Inoperable

DTC.DESCRIPTION: Invalid Data Received From Body Control Module

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Fail: DTC set if Message ID 0x3B4::TPMSTT In (Tire_Press_Telltale) is invalid for 5 sec or more. Pass: Received Valid Data for all listed messages.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: TPMS Telltale flashes for 75 sec then telltale is solid ON

DTC.DESCRIPTION: Invalid Data Received from HVAC Control Module "A"

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Invalid data in Signal Outside_Air_Temp_Stat (for Message ID 0x41A) for 5 sec or more. Pass: Received Valid Data for all listed messages.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Features inoperable: Outside Air Temperature

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Invalid data in Signal OAT In (Message 0x41a ) for 5 sec or more. Pass: Received Valid Data for all listed messages.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Outside air temperature will display dashes

DTC.DESCRIPTION: Invalid Data Received From Steering Column Control Module

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Logged if AhbStat_B_Dsply (AutoHighBeamSCCM In) = On & AhbFeat_D_Stat (AutoHighBeamIPMA In) = None For at least 5 consecutive seconds.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Message center menu navigation buttons inoperable.

DTC.DESCRIPTION: Invalid Data Received From Trailer Brake Control Module

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Invalid data in Signal XXXXX (Message XXX ) for 5 sec or more. Pass: Received Valid Data for all listed messages.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Features inoperable: XXXXXXX

DTC.DESCRIPTION: Invalid Data Received From Restraints Control Module

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Invalid data in Signal XXXXX (Message XXX ) for 5 sec or more. Pass: Received Valid Data for all listed messages.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Features inoperable: XXXXXXX

DTC.DESCRIPTION: Invalid Data Received From Parking Assist Control Module "A"

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: TBD

DTC.DESCRIPTION: Invalid Data Received From Side Obstacle Detection Control Module "A"

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Fail: DTC set if: {Side Detect = Enabled AND SodLeft_D_Stat (0x3A6) = 0x04 | 0x05 | 0x06 | 0x07 for 1,6 seconds} OR {Cross Traffic = Enabled AND CtaSnsLeft_D_Stat (0x3A6) = 0x03 for 1,6 seconds} OR {Cross Traffic == Enabled AND CtaLeft_D_Stat (0x3A6) = 0x04 | 0x05 | 0x06 | 0x07 for 1,6 seconds} Pass: Received data for all listed signals.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Features inoperable: Blind Spot Monitor or Cross Traffic

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Fail: DTC set if: {Cross Traffic = Enabled & CtaLeft_D_Stat] (0x3A6) = 0x03 (Disabled)} OR {Cross Traffic = Disabled & CtaLeft_D_Stat (0x3A6) != 0x03 (Disabled} Pass: Correct Configuration - matching configuration and CAN signal.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Features inoperable: Blind Spot Monitor or Cross Traffic Alert

DTC.DESCRIPTION: Invalid Data Received From Side Obstacle Detection Control Module "B"

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Fail: DTC set if: {Side Detect = Enabled & SodRight_D_Stat (0x3A7) = (0x04 | 0x05 | 0x06 | 0x07) for 1,6 seconds} OR {Cross Traffic = Enabled & CtaSnsRight_D_Stat (0x3A7) = 0x03 for 1,6 seconds} OR {Cross Traffic = Enabled & CtaRight_D_Stat (0x3A7) = (0x04 | 0x05 | 0x06 | 0x07) for 1,6 seconds} Pass: Received data for all listed signals.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Features inoperable: Blind Spot Monitor and Cross Traffic Alert

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Fail: DTC set if: {Cross Traffic = Enabled & CtaRight_D_Stat (0x3A7) = 0x03 (Disabled)} OR {Cross Traffic = Disabled & CtaRight_D_Stat (0x3A7) != 0x03 (Disabled} Pass: Correct Configuration - matching configuration and CAN signal.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Blind spot monitor, Cross traffic alert features will not work properly

DTC.DESCRIPTION: Invalid Data Received From Accessory Protocol Interface Module

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Invalid data in Signal XXXXX (Message XXX ) for 5 sec or more. Pass: Received Valid Data for all listed messages.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Features inoperable: XXXXXXX

DTC.DESCRIPTION: Invalid Data Received From Front Controls Interface Module "A"

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Invalid data in Signal Outside_Air_Temp_Stat (Message 0x41a ) for 5 sec or more. Pass: Received Valid Data for all listed messages.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Outside air temperature will display dashes.

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Fail: DTC set if invalid data in signal Outside_Air_Temp_Stat ( 0x41A) for 5 seconds or more. Pass: Received Known Data for all listed messages.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Outside air temperature will display dashes

DTC.DESCRIPTION: Invalid Data Received From Hybrid/EV Powertrain Control Module "A"

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Fail: DTC set if signal DestSocRqd_Pc_Dsply (0x311) | BattTracLoSoc_D_Dsply (0x311) | VehElRnge_L2_Dsply (0x312) | EffWhlLvl2_Pc_Dsply (0x365) | RgenEvntLvl_Pc_Dsply (0x474) has invalid data for 5 sec or more. Pass: Valid Data from HPCM received.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Features inoperable:

DTC.DESCRIPTION: Initial Configuration Not Complete

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Fail: Module configuration not performed Pass: Module configuration executed successfully
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Some of the optional/desired features may not be functional.

DTC.DESCRIPTION: Control Module Configuration Incompatible

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Fail: IPC Seatbelt Configuration Mismatch. Pass: IPC Seatbelt Configuration Match
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Features inoperable: Seatbelt Warning

DTC.DESCRIPTION: Control Module

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Fail: NVM(EEPROM) or ROM Corruption. Pass: NVM(EEPROM) and ROM OK
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Memory Failure. Adaptive Cruise Control feature will not work.

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Fail: Odo NVM(EEPROM) Corruption. Pass: Odo NVM(EEPROM) OK
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: OdometerMasterValue is Invalid and Odometer displays "Error"

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: When a display or other fault requires the cluster to go to its Safe State, safety µC failure, or a failure in the execution of operational software. * Refer to Control Module IPC FUSA Malfunction DTC in section Ford DTC - Specific
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: Log DTC. Display Global Safe State Warning.

DTC.DESCRIPTION: Battery Voltage

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Fail: Voltage below 7.8 Volts continuously for 5 sec. Pass: Normal Voltage
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: Log DTC. All Features will be turned Off except HSCAN
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Cluster appears OFF

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Fail: Voltage above 16 Volts continuously for 5 sec. Pass: Normal Voltage
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: Log DTC. All Features will be turned Off except HSCAN
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Cluster appears OFF

DTC.DESCRIPTION: Ignition Switch

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Fail: Ingition mode reported as Crank for longer than 15 seconds Pass: Normal Ignition mode
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Cluster appears OFF

ENUM_MEMBER.DESCRIPTION: Valid Application Software is NOT Present
IPC - Ford DNA Chime B (Soft Warning)
IPC - Ford DNA Chime C (Hard Warning)
IPC - Ford DNA Chime D (Non-Critical Alert) - Info
IPC - Ford DNA "B" Chime Shortened To 0.5 Second
IPC - Lincoln DNA Chime B (Soft Warning)
IPC - Lincoln DNA Chime C (Hard Warning)
IPC - Lincoln DNA Chime D (Non-Critical Alert) - Info
IPC - Lincoln DNA "B" Chime Shortened To 0.5 Second
IPC - ACC High And Forward Collision Warning (FCW) Chime
IPC - Reverse Park Aid Continuous Chime
IPC - Forward Park Aid Continuous Chime
IPC - Power Liftgate (POT)/Power Sliding Door Chime
IPC Heavy Truck Lane Departurre Warning
Radio - Ford DNA Chime B (Soft Warning)
Radio - Ford DNA Chime C (Hard Warning)
Radio - Ford DNA Chime D (Non-Critical Alert) - Info
Radio - Ford DNA "B" Chime Shortened To 0.5 Second
Radio - Lincoln DNA Chime B (Soft Warning)
Radio - Lincoln DNA Chime C (Hard Warning)
Radio - Lincoln DNA Chime D (Non-Critical Alert) - Info
Radio - Lincoln DNA "B" Chime Shortened to 0.5 Second
Radio - ACC High And Forward Collision Warning (FCW) Chime
Radio - Reverse Park Aid Continuous Chime
Radio - Forward Park Aid Continuous Chime
Radio - Power Liftgate (POT)/Power Sliding Door Chime
Radio - Heavy Truck Lane Departure Warning (LDW) Chime
Set all HM DID Parameters/Log to default
Set all HM counters to default
Set all HM Logs to default
Not all HM DID parameters in default
All HM DID parameters set to defaults
Set all HM DID Parameters/Log to default
Set all HM counters to default
Set all HM Logs to default

ROUTINE.NAME: SUPPPLIER USE CyberSecurity - Ports and Secure Boot
SUPPLIER USE Program NVM from ROM
SUPPLIER USE Perform Host Micro Checksum
SUPPLIER USE Dataflash NVM access by blockID
